problem: Why do all animals sleep — what is the essential biological function?
hypothesis: The key to Why do all animals sleep — what is the essential biological function? is Dopamine/serotonin reuptake inhibition with specificity — specifically Dopamine/serotonin reuptake inhibition — which would help 8,000,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: fMRI connectivity study with 21 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
